context: Headline verdict attestation TX. Calldata holds the canonical evidence hash signed independently by Frankfurt Judge ed25519 + NYC Verifier ed25519. Both pubkeys embedded; both signatures publicly verifiable via agents/treasurer/scripts/decode-attestation-tx.mjs. Reproducibility test (2026-05-02) confirmed VALID ✓ against this TX.
calldata_format: 8 bytes ASCII marker QUORUMV1, 2 bytes payload length uint16 BE, payload JSON UTF-8, 64-byte Frankfurt Judge ed25519 sig, 64-byte NYC Verifier ed25519 sig

payload.claim: 5-agent mesh cross-validation: Judge (Frankfurt) and Verifier (NYC) independently signed canonical evidence hash, Treasurer anchored signed verdict on Base mainnet via 0-value calldata-only transaction.

verification_status: VALID ✓ — both Frankfurt Judge and NYC Verifier ed25519 signatures verified against embedded pubkeys (run: node agents/treasurer/scripts/decode-attestation-tx.mjs 0x19bb1d0eb990de5152c753e185cd44bca3bf7445abafa982132263a0e1763f22)
tx_type: 0x2 (EIP-1559); Treasurer wallet itself is EIP-7702 set-code delegate (Pectra smart EOA, code prefix 0xef0100… confirmed via eth_getCode against 0xd779cE46…6058C893)
